title: Just Another Create Pack (JACP)
description: A Create Modpack for Create 6.0.5 with some of the best create add-ons!
body:
# Welcome to Just Another Create Pack!
JACP Is a Create Modpack for the newest version of Create (Create 6.0.5)

With JACP you can experience the latest version of Create as easy as pressing download and play!
With the Essential Mod installed in the modpack you can local host servers for your friends for **_FREE_** 

We also have Cubes without borders so you can have the full(screen) experience without looking at the taskbar or Minecraft minimizing when you check Discord ;)

## Future Plans
I plan to add other mods that aren't yet avaliable for Create 6 when they come out

When it works better with EMI i will be replacing JEI

### My personal favorite mods of the pack:
- Jade | See what blocks are, where they are from, whats in them and what to mine them with!
- Essential
- Create (ofc)
- Xaero's Map & Minimap
- WorldEdit | For the Creative mode players
- Tectonic | For pretty worldgen
- JEI


### Curseforge
Nope forget it, they aint paying me enough and none of y'all are gonna put it on there
